reviews.review_description:
UPDATE 2.0: it’s been a few months now, and there hasn’t been new classes with the Pilates. I feel I’m just doing the same ones over again now. I downloaded the Alo app on iPhone and there seems to be more updates there than on meta  which is quite dissapointing. i may have spoke to soon.

UPDATE: So, it’s been 7 days and still I am very impressed. After the first few classes i could not move for a couple days but a good old yoga session to stretch was what I needed. I still agree more classes/videos need to be added but I am wondering as this is still new they are working on this? As well as the monthly payments being a little high, but going by the graphics, hand tracking etc it can be a work around especially if more classes will hopefully be added each week. After following on instagram and downloading the arlowellness app I did not expect it to be so big in the world so I have high hopes for the meta side (would be good if the app can connect to meta). 

I’ve downloaded Arlo so still in the “free 7 day trial”. From what I’ve read to thinking “ahh sod it I’ll try it for a week it’s free” I wasn’t expecting much. BUT! I’m impressed I won’t lie, there is no need to download the videos before you can play, the graphics are great, and the movement and adjustments of the mini instructors are good and they are so helpful!. The space is great and the fact you can move the instructor and mini instructors is very helpful!. So far I have done 3 sessions and all worked perfectly. 

There’s a mixture of Pilates, yoga, barre, meditation and sound baths. If you submit your  style And just answer a few questions and what you wanting to do it for (I.e tone, get flexible or just destress) it does really help. I have no equipment for Pilates but I have seen they do with and without weights and leg weights. If I do carry on I will buy the equipment and change my preferences. AND YOU DO NOT NEED YOUR CONTROLLERS! A big game changer! 

I do agree the payment is a little high a month and at the moment there is not many videos but, when you first start it can be overwhelming with to many videos to choose. And it does use alot of battery life. Hopefully the more people use this the more they can upload and give us more options. I feel the mix reality can be improved and adjusted slightly but that’s being picky. So far I am a happy customer.i will be back after the free trial to update my thoughts after.

developer_response.body:
Hi LouT233! Thank you so much for giving Alo Moves XR a try, and for sharing such a thoughtful review. We love hearing that what started as a “why not?” moment turned into a pleasant surprise 😊

It’s great to know the graphics, spatial flexibility, and mini instructors have been helpful, and that everything has run smoothly across your first few sessions. The ability to move instructors around your space - and to practice completely hands-free without controllers - is something we’re especially proud of, so we’re THRILLED you’re finding it to be a game changer.

We also appreciate your honest feedback around pricing, content volume, battery usage, and mixed reality. It’s incredibly valuable to hear what’s resonating and where there’s room for refinement.

Thanks again for taking the time to share your experience. We’re so happy to have you moving with us and look forward to hearing your thoughts after the trial.

reviews.review_description: Seemed to be lots of Barre & Pilates. I was looking for more yoga, which they have little of. And the pace was too fast for me. I was barely into a pose& the instructor was already moving on. The video is good quality, the scenes were nice. Movable mini instructors are really cool. Not worth a subscription to me.

developer_response.body:
Hi FatManRollin! Thanks so much for sharing your feedback - we really appreciate you taking the time. We’re glad you enjoyed the video quality, environments, and movable mini instructors, and we hear you on wanting more yoga and a slower pace.

If you’re open to it, you might enjoy our 7-Day Yoga Reset series. It’s built around mindful, approachable movement - starting with shorter five-minute flows and gradually progressing to longer, more grounding practices, ending with a 30-minute session on the final day. This series is designed to help you stretch deeper, sleep better, and feel stronger from head to toe.

Thanks again for giving Alo Moves XR a try and for sharing your honest perspective - it’s always helpful to hear what resonates (and what doesn’t).

reviews.review_description:
It has lot of potential, the price is high, you have to download the videos before watching, they TOOK forever to download, and if you close the app (or live it in hold) to do something in another app the download stop and you have to restart the download. 
So do not worth for me cause I want the app for exercise, I just waisted my time.

developer_response.body: Hi kytziaa! Thanks for sharing your experience - we’re sorry to hear how frustrating this was. We know interruptions and long downloads can get in the way when you’re just trying to work out, and that’s not the experience we want for our members. We appreciate you giving Alo Moves XR a try and taking the time to share your feedback.

reviews.review_title: This was super glitchy and a big bummer
reviews.review_description: The app was cool until it stopped working. I tried a barre workout and at a certain point it paused to a screen where it was letting me resize the screen but no matter how many times I tried accessing the meta menu with the pinching of my fingers it wouldn’t exit. At one point I got to the option where I could select quit the app and it wouldn’t quit the app. Super glitchy and not interested now. Also was hoping for a fully immersive experience and not just a giant screen.

developer_response.body:
Hi Desi201612! Thanks so much for sharing your experience — we’re really sorry this interrupted your workout. That’s not the experience we aim to provide.

Based on your description, this may have been related to a system-level issue, and we’d love to look into it further and help troubleshoot. If you’re open to it, please reach out to our support team at SupportXR@alomoves.com
 for assistance.

We also appreciate your feedback around immersion, which is helpful as we continue improving the experience. Thanks again for taking the time to share your feedback with us.

reviews.review_description: Subscribed for a year but cancelling soon. Nice concept but tiny catalog, content stopped loading for awhile and they recently added a pointless boundary that’s too small. Graphics disappear when you stretch because the boundary is so small it does not cover an entire yoga mat. Emailed about this and other issues and support doesn’t seem aware that XR exists

Very lifelike instructors, the mini instructors are the best part and make it so much easier to follow than watching a video. The classes are good lengths, and the instructors are great. I can’t wait to see future developments and new sessions. The best mixed reality experience I’ve seen. 

I do wish that they would have more frequent updates, better communications on future enhancements and more trainers / workouts, but I do enjoy what they have. The meditations and sound baths are ok but could be improved. They fixed the subscription issue for those of us that subscribed initially which was good.

reviews.review_title: No longer able to start/run app at all
reviews.review_description:
**UPDATE!!  - got in touch with customer support. 
Great customer service after all. Despite the issues with the changes to the subscription service, they made a real effort to make sure I was kept updated and resolved the issue. Much appreciated! I would definitely recommend the app now as up until the subscription issue, I was enjoying it very much**


Deeply disappointed - after having been forced to change to monthly subscription, which I have accepted and was willing to do, now that my yearly subscription has run out I am no longer able to run the app at all!  - getting stopped by an 'Error message' every time I try to pay/subscribe to monthly to use the app.

I have tried everything on my browser, on my phone, on the quest itself and each time I try to create a new subscription or change my old subscription it will not let me. I have tried uninstalling and reinstalling the app. I keep getting the same message everytime I go to pay "a problem occurred when trying to complete your request.." I just want to do yoga. And on top of everything, I cannot find any customer support email/chat/message option anyway. I'm very frustrated with this app at the moment. 

I would like someone from Alo Moves to please help me resolve this issue. I really would change my review.. but at the moment, being denied from running the app because I was a previous subscriber, and the fact I am unable to find customer support, seems like a serious issue

reviews.review_title: Would be amazing if it worked
reviews.review_description:
When I got it to work it was great but that only happened once. The other times it would freeze or the app would close. I guess you could download it but others said it crashes sometimes when you try to do that. It must be their servers because when I play supernatural which streams from their end I never have any problems.

Honestly just get Club Pilates it's the same minus the mini instructors but at least there is no subscription fee

developer_response.body:
We’re really sorry to hear you didn’t have a better experience. We took a look on our end and didn’t see any red flags with your connection, so it’s tough to say exactly what caused the issue — but we totally get how frustrating that can be.

We just released three brand-new yoga classes we’re really excited about, and we’d love for you to give it another shot if you're up for it.

Thanks again for sharing your feedback — it means a lot.

reviews.review_description: Vidoe durations very short. Also very few in VR format. Why would you pay for  videos not in VR format. Total rip off

I’ve been a subscriber for awhile. The servers have always been unbearably slow, so you have to download the content to your device.
Recently, it got worse. 

I tried reinstalling to no avail. The app crashes before anything finishes downloading. When I finally managed to download a class, it crashes before it begins playing. 

Your saved classes no longer sync so good luck finding them. I tried contacting customer support but was told I have to contact Meta and they wouldn’t offer a refund even though this hasn’t worked in two months.

developer_response.body:
Karrut, we're so sorry you’ve had this experience! 

We reviewed your connection to our servers and found it was performing poorly. 

While we did have issues with downloads in the past, those have now been resolved. However, any content downloaded before the fix may still cause problems. But, we have some tips that might help!

To ensure smooth playback, please remove any existing downloads by:
1. Tapping the search icon at the top right of the menu.
2. Swiping the list of filters at the top to the left until you reach “FOR YOU.”
3. Selecting the dropdown menu and going to Downloads.
4. Deleting all previously downloaded content.

After doing so, please restart the app and try downloading your classes again. Make sure the downloads are fully completed before attempting to play them.

We truly appreciate your feedback and we look forward to your experience with us only getting better. 😇

reviews.review_description:
I've been enjoying using this app for daily exercise for nearly 8 months now and the implementation of the instructor and mini instructors is a great concept and fully uses the benefits of mixed reality. However I do feel the content of the subscription option is a little poor with only 2-3 classes offered each month, and generally only 1 of those will be of interest to me do to level or session length.
I know it probably takes additional effort to film these sessions, but I think if the video lessons were enhanced to also offer "mini screens" in place of mini instructors, these would complement the virtual instructor offerings very well. As they stand the videos can be harder to follow as they move quicker and require more attention to watching the screen. Having mini screens would solve this and probably boost the value of the subscription.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words and thoughtful feedback. We're stoked to hear you’ve been enjoying the app and the mixed reality experience! The mini instructors are one of our favorite parts too.

We really appreciate your feedback on the subscription content and the idea of using mini screens to support video-based sessions — that’s a great suggestion, and definitely something we'll share with the team. We’re always exploring ways to make the experience more accessible and valuable for every kind of mover.

Also, we just dropped 3 brand-new yoga classes last Friday that we hope you’ll check out. We think you’ll really enjoy them.

Thanks again for being part of the journey with us, and for sticking with it for 8 months! That means a lot.

reviews.review_description: I think the menu/selections needs some improvement, but the teacher visuals (life size and mini) are fantastic. I love pairing this with Supernatural —I love the instructions and coaching in this Yoga app. I subscribed —hoping the content grows. I’d also like the choice of a fully VR yoga studio alongside the mixed reality option. But I’m loving it —the mini teacher view is so helpful. Thank you Alo VR for getting this shy person  into a yoga class-and more! -

What I love most about this app are the mini yoga instructors—they make it so much easier to follow the movements. I also really enjoy the full-size instructors, which give me the feeling of being in a real class. However, I’ve noticed that the display quality of the full-size instructors could be improved, as it's not quite as clear as I expected. Another thing that feels a bit off is the environment screen—not being 360 degrees makes the experience feel somewhat limited.

If these two areas could be enhanced, I truly believe this app would be one of the best, if not the best, on the VR market. I'm a bit surprised that, given how long the app has been available, there haven’t been improvements in the instructor's image quality, which can be a little discouraging to use it. I really hope to eventually see these two flaws fixed, specially since this is a subscription based app. This app has so much potential to be the best, but it is not yet!

Went to try this app, had to download a class as was unable to stream it as it said my internet connection was too slow (opened a browser and did a speed test 50mbps down 26mbps up) no worries tho maybe there servers are under load. so downloaded a class, started it took a while for hand tracking to enable but still not too bad, but half way thought the class it just drops out and crashes the whole app, okay so reload and start again same spot same issue crashes. so after doing 7mins of a class, I recommend just youtube a class and just watch that pretty much the same thing

developer_response.body:
Hey slipdigby.2024! We sincerely apologize for the issues you’ve been experiencing. The good news is you should be back in business! 

Based on your feedback, we believe we've identified the issue you were experiencing with a couple of our classes when downloading & playing the classes. We were able to promptly fix the issue and the changes should be live now. If you've previously downloaded any classes, we recommend deleting the downloads and re-downloading them.

With that said, if you haven’t already done so, PLEASE PLEASE reach out to us at SupportXR@alomoves.com and we’ll get you taken care of. Again, sorry for the inconvenience and we look forward to your experience with us only getting better. 😊

reviews.review_description: So surprised at how realistic the instructor looks. Thought it would feel too plain and boring but this was a lot of fun and harder than I thought with the advance classes. Looking forward to the new class drops.

I don’t really ever do yoga so this was fun for me to actually be able to give it a try in the privacy of my own home. Definitely feel like I can get the same type of exercise with this app as I could with IRL. Great idea Alo!

I am new to Yoga , pilates . I  tried the 1st week trial but, besides amazing views, I think this app would be amazing if it offered   tutorials like other fitness apps. I did not suscribe because of this. I like how some fitness apps have guidance /programs and structure for beginners.

I am a first time headset user and an occasional yoga goer.  I stumbled upon this app and decided to give it a try.  Yoga-tta be kidding me! It was so much fun. It is easy to use and has lots of classes to choose from.  It's a fun way to work out at home and a great way to hone your technique.  I really enjoyed the extra mini instructor feature which allowed me to easily keep an eye on form while I was in the various positions.  I've watched yoga classes on YouTube in the past but the 3D realism makes this a unique experience.  I highly recommend! Namastay in shape, y'all!

reviews.review_title: The best yoga/pilates app there is
reviews.review_description: Late last year I started practicing yoga and I was really enjoying it. And then at some point I saw Alomoves XR was about to be released. 2D yoga for a beginner is  quite inconvenient, so I decided to buy a Quest 3 and subscribe to Alomoves. So basically I bought my Quest 3 just for this app alone. And what a great decision that was! Loving my yoga journey!

I principally use my Quest just for fitness these days. I’ve tried all the fitness apps, believe me only a few have stuck around. Vzfit for bike, Holofit for rowing, FitXR for Cardio, Litesport for weights.    I’m really fed up with subscriptions so nearly passed this by but really wanted a good yoga ap, there aren’t any! Wanted some gentle stretching type stuff first thing in the morning. Thought I’d give the free trial a whirl and really impressed with the look of this thing. Really well thought out. The menu is a bit clunky, not that easy to find what you want but the overall experience is great. Being able to move the little people around, if you try it you will know what I mean, is genius. I am going to let my sub run at least for now. Definitely the best yoga app

I’ve been a fan of Alo moves for years and I’ve also been really wanting to do yoga in VR… and I think Alo moves VR has really found a great way to: 1- show the instructors well, 2- to allow the player options on how to arrange their space during their session, and 3- to be incredibly intuitive and accessible. 

Well done, Alo Moves. Keep up the good work!￼

reviews.review_title: Private Pilates and Yoga at home!
reviews.review_description:
I just tried my first few classes on the Alo Moves XR and I'm seriously blown away! I expected it to be a gimmick but to my surprise, I stand corrected.

The life size 3D instructors make it feel like I'm in a private class right in my living room. I don't think I will be rushing to a studio to squeeze a class before work. I think those little mini instructors are my favorite feature and make the entire workout so much better. They are a total lifesaver for checking out the correct form and posture. It's definitely helping me get the poses and will improve my overall form. I went in skeptical, but now I'm a big fan.
Hello, I did an annual subscription a few weeks ago and now, when I try to use the app it asks me again for a subscription!! What can I do to use the app??

developer_response.body:
Hi dthomaz! We're so sorry to hear you're having trouble accessing Alo Moves XR with your current subscription. The good news is that our team has identified the issue and taken the necessary steps to ensure it doesn’t happen again. 

In the meantime, we recommend canceling your existing subscription before May 4 to avoid being charged (it looks like you signed up for a free 30-day trial on April 4). After that, you can go through the subscription sign-up process again to restore access.

If you have any other questions or concerns, please don’t hesitate to reach out to our customer support team at SupportXR@alomoves.com — we’re here to help and will make sure you're taken care of. We truly apologize for the inconvenience!

We hope this resolves the issue for you and that you'll consider updating your review. We really appreciate your feedback and support.

reviews.review_title: Nice idea but very glitchy and unusable
reviews.review_description: I was really looking forward to using this app but it was so glitchy that I couldn’t get past the first class I tried. I even tried downloading the entire class before playing but that didn’t help either. It crashed several times. Nice idea but needs a lot of bug fixes, not worth installing even if it was free but that hefty price tag for a completely unusable app is ridiculous.

reviews.review_title: Alo Moves XR – Next-Level Yoga & Pilates
reviews.review_description:
Alo Moves XR takes home workouts to an entirely new level with its immersive and high-quality Yoga and Pilates sessions. Whether you’re a beginner looking to build flexibility or an advanced practitioner seeking to deepen your practice, this platform delivers top-tier instruction in a stunning virtual environment.

The XR experience truly sets it apart—feeling as if you’re practicing in a peaceful retreat rather than just your living room. The instructors are world-class, offering clear, detailed guidance that makes even complex movements accessible. Plus, the variety is fantastic, from power flows to restorative yoga and challenging Pilates routines that sculpt and strengthen.

What makes Alo Moves XR stand out is its seamless integration of mindfulness and fitness. The sessions don’t just push your body; they enhance your overall well-being, with breathwork and meditation elements that leave you feeling rejuvenated.

If you’re looking for a premium at-home workout experience that blends cutting-edge technology with expert-led instruction, Alo Moves XR is absolutely worth it!

My wife and I just got married and have been looking for different ways to stay in shape outside of the gym. We both work from home and struggled to find a good balance between wellness and our busy schedules. This app is a game changer and allows us to work out together from home. The classes go beyond fitness! The meditation has really helped with my anxiety. Highly recommend..

As someone who’s been practicing yoga for over 10 years, I’m blown away by Alo XR. The immersive experience takes everything I love about Alo to the next level. The virtual classes make it feel like I’m practicing right in the studio, with stunning visuals and seamless technology that keep me motivated and connected.

The instructors are incredible as always, and I love how interactive the platform is—there’s such a strong sense of community. Whether you’re flowing, meditating, or exploring something new like breathwork, Alo XR creates a space to fully immerse yourself.

Highly recommend it to anyone looking to deepen their practice or just enjoy fitness in a whole new way. Alo never misses!

reviews.review_title: Great concept and looks, but unusable
reviews.review_description:
The background: I'm a 45-year-old guy trying to balance my training with some mobility exercises before going to work. Ideally, the training would also be funny and inspiring to set the right mood before getting out of that door.  For example, Jonah from Nike Training has been able to do that for me. 


I tried the Alo Moves for the Meta Quest 3 and had mixed feelings. On one hand, the visuals and concept seemed nice, but the technical execution and overall vibes  left me unimpressed.

Deal breaker 1:  The downloads were very slow, and I had to wear the headset during the entire process. I thought I could download the class in the background and start it later when it was convenient. But after the long download was finally done, the class I wanted to try was no longer available, which was frustrating.

Deal breaker 2:  the instructor felt completely robotic. They didn’t seem relatable or inspiring at all. For me, that’s a big part of sports classes — to feel connected to the teacher, even digitally. The experience just lacked that human touch of imperfections and spontaenity.

Finally, I didn’t find the app beginner-friendly. There wasn’t a fun or inspiring tutorial to get me started. I think a good first impression with an approachable and engaging lesson would have made a huge difference. Instead, I felt more like a test user than someone welcomed into the world of AloMoves.



---

Summary of Issues and Proposals:

Problems:

1. Slow and inconvenient downloads that require wearing the headset throughout.


2. Classes disappear after download completion.


3. Robotic and uninspiring instructors that lack a human touch.


4. No beginner-friendly tutorial to create a welcoming experience.




Suggestions for Improvement:

1. Enable background downloading and ensure classes remain accessible once downloaded.


2. Introduce instructors with relatable and engaging personalities.


3. Add a fun and inspiring tutorial for first-time user to make a connection with the teachers.


4. Balance futuristic aesthetics with practical and relatable design elements.




Cheers, P

The videos take often a long time to upload and are continually interrupted. Like many other users who have already written, initially I thought it was an internet connection problem, but actually the other Apps work well, the upload problems are only by Alo Moves. I have seen that every time somebody has complained about the upload problems your standard answer has been that the problem has just been solved, but it is always there. The idea is good and the 3D resolution is excellent, it is really a pity that it doesn't work.

developer_response.body:
Hey Pippo5555, we appreciate your honesty and are looking forward to winning you over with our latest build update, featuring Downloadable Classes!! 😉 We recognize a stable internet speed of over 100 Mbps isn't available for most users and have been working hard on a solution to streamline the 3D volcaps.  

I'll save you all the tech jargon (unless you do wanna nerd out, in which case I'd love to share more 🤓) but, in an effort to maintain the excellent 3D resolution you spoke of, we'll be rolling out a download feature, so classes can be downloaded to your headset, eliminating the need to stream such hi-res files.  We hope this will change your experience and deliver a seamless gameplay flow.

With that said, if you haven’t already done so, PLEASE PLEASE reach out to us at SupportXR@alomoves.com and we’ll get you taken care of. Again, sorry for the inconvenience and we look forward to your experience with us only getting better. 😇

reviews.review_description: Was trying to get into yoga more this year but going to class as a newbie is a bit intimidating. This was perfect for understanding the basics and evolving from there. Highly recommend for peeps who don’t wanna look crazy in their first yoga class 😂

This is an excellent app. The 3D mini instructor avatars are amazing and will stop you form hearting your neck.
The classes are great and the scenery is beautiful, although I wish they  make it bigger top to bottom. 

Just download the classes instead of streaming them and you will definately enjoy it.

This is so exciting!! I wasn’t sure how I would feel about moving my workouts into a digital space but this is so worth it. Loved the experience and love the ability to workout with my favorite instructors anywhere, any time. IM A FAN!!

I really enjoy unwinding with this app.  There’s a class for everyone whether you want stretching, meditation, or just a good workout.  It feels like a one on one class with amazing instruction.  I just got a VR headset and found the app easy to use.  We are in the future!

developer_response.body:
The future is here Yoshi18!! haha, thanks so much for your positive feedback!  We are working hard to deliver a cutting-edge experience and are so grateful you're enjoying AloMoves XR!  We have New Classes dropping every two weeks, so keep an eye out for those regularly scheduled content drops. 😉

Please let us know what you're enjoying most in the experience so we can continue working on delivering more of what you love! 🙏🏽✨

reviews.review_description:
As an Alo Moves subscriber for years I think this is a rip-off. Why isn’t there an option for me to use my existing log-in without making a new subscription for an extremely limited catalog?

Edit/update:  I reached out to Alo XR support after receiving feedback from the developer. Their support took no action, and hasn’t responded in over a month. I gave them a screenshot of the developer response, and still nothing.

developer_response.body:
Utulu, just wanted to start by apologizing on behalf of our team for not responding to your email sooner.  Thanks to your review and email, we've been able to implement some new sorting and response processes to ensure this doesn't happen again.  Additionally, in regards to Single Sign-On, that's unfortunately not a feature Meta allows due to privacy & data concerns.

We truly appreciate your honesty and help as we continue building on the Meta platform!  Please don't hesitate to write us back or re-visit our app as we're constantly dropping new updates and classes monthly!! 🙏🏽

reviews.review_description: Enjoy the session, felt like I was there in person..

I was so excited to do this. I activated my free trial and was prepared to pay for a years membership.

Got to the homepage, and most of the content isn’t even visible for me. I see all mediations and sound baths, but only 9 Pilates workouts and exactly ZERO yoga workouts are there. Under that tab, it’s just white.

I’ve restarted the app several times to no avail. 
I know this app is relatively new, so I was prepared to look past a few bugs. But literally 80% of the app doesn’t exist for me, and if it doesn’t show up before the end of my trial, unfortunately I’m going to have to cancel. Which is a shame because from the Pilates class I tried, this app has excellent potential 🙁

developer_response.body:
Hey nita.272859!! We genuinely appreciate your feedback and are thrilled to that you’re excited about our app – we LOVE to hear it! 🙏🏽  On the other hand, we sincerely apologize for the issues you've been experiencing. The good news is our team has already identified a fix and you should be back in business!

With that said, if you haven’t already done so, PLEASE PLEASE reach out to us at SupportXR@alomoves.com and we’ll get you taken care of. Again, sorry for the inconvenience and we look forward to your experience with us only getting better. 😊

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this app while on the free trial. The instruction is great and the exercises were really helping with my flexibility and nerve pain I've been dealing with. However, when I started paying for the membership I started having problems with the videos not loading. And when they do load and start, they freeze every 15-30 seconds. I thought at first it was my internet connection, but everything else works properly with no issues. Fix the loading and buffering issues and this would be a great app.

developer_response.body:
Hey Wesradkins!!  We genuinely appreciate your feedback and are glad when things were working you LOVED the app!!  We would love to connect and learn a bit more about the issues you were experiencing so we can refine our buffer/load times.  Good news though is we have a solution on the way to help make this aspect of the app much smoother and more seamless.

With that said, PLEASE PLEASE reach out to us at SupportXR@alomoves.com and we’ll get you taken care of. 😉  Again, sorry for the inconvenience, and we look forward to your experience with us only getting better!!

reviews.review_description: VR and Yoga seems odd but actually if a beautiful combination like a Taco Bell and KFC 😎
Sick VR WORLD, AWESOME WAY GO GET MY YOGA ON THE DAILY GRIND!!! Ride that pony.

1- I’ve been part of Alo Yoga fam for 2 years now. I don’t understand why i have to pay twice and i can’t connect my account here.
2- it’s taking so long to load and most of the times it fails to load. I thought i had a network issue but when i go to other apps i can connect fast with no issues

However i love how real it is, i managed to do only one full class and the rest with fail to load or cut mid session. I hope you can fix these issues

developer_response.body:
Hi Joudfaraj, Thank you for reaching out and sharing your thoughts with us! 🙏🏽 We truly appreciate your loyalty as a long-time Alo Moves subscriber and understand how frustrating it must be not being able to use your existing login for Alo Moves XR just yet!!  The good news is we’re actively working on a smoother signup experience for our existing members!! 

Thank you for also pointing out the streaming issue with some of the classes. We have corrected an upload error, and those classes should play properly now. Please give it another shot! :) Let us know if you experience any further issues.  In the meantime, please reach out to SupportXR@alomoves.com and we’ll get you taken care of. 😉  Again, sorry for the inconvenience, and we look forward to your experience with us only getting better!!

reviews.review_description: I only see like six classes. Why would I pay for this? Also the hand controls are impossible to use and it’s not registering my hand. Wish I had the option to use a controller. The headset is awkward especially when we laid on the floor. I don’t see the point.

developer_response.body:
Hi tbonus273,

Thank you for taking the time to download and review the experience; we truly appreciate your feedback.

It sounds like you might be having issues navigating the menu tablet, which could explain why you don’t see all the classes. The menu is designed to be scrollable like an iPad. You can also click the “See More” button, which will take you to the class finder page where you can search all available classes. To ensure your hands are being tracked, they should have a white outline around them. If your hands aren’t being tracked, try tapping the controllers together twice to activate hand tracking. 

Additionally, you can use the controllers to navigate the experience if you prefer.

Currently, there are 32 volumetric 3D instructor classes and 100 Alo-exclusive 2D classes available. We are actively adding more each month, so those numbers will be increasing rapidly.

The mixed reality yoga and Pilates experiences have been designed to minimize any movements that might be uncomfortable while in the headset. However, please listen to your body and do what feels best for you.

Thank you once again for your feedback. If you have any additional issues or questions, please don’t hesitate to reach out via email at SupportXR@alomoves.com.

reviews.review_description: Took a very long time to download despite my fast internet.  Crashed a few times and not intuitive

developer_response.body:
LeilaGee, we're so sorry you had that experience and truly appreciate your honesty. 🙏🏽  Would you mind emailing our team, SupportXR@alomoves.com, so we can look a bit more into your experience.  

With our built-in speed test feature, it should allow for streaming if internet speeds are within a certain range, which would eliminate the need to download classes. With that said, we'd love to take a deeper look so we can work to improve your overall experience with AloMoves XR. Thanks again for your feedback and help!

reviews.review_description: I already have an Alo Moves subscription, this won’t work with my current subscription? Since there’s no way to log in, I guess I have to have a whole separate subscription to use on the VR? No thanks.

developer_response.body: Hi ROILYB, Thank you for reaching out and sharing your thoughts with us! 🙏🏽 We truly appreciate your loyalty as a long-time Alo Moves subscriber and understand how frustrating it must be not being able to use your existing login for Alo Moves XR just yet!!  The good news is we’re actively working on a smoother signup experience for our existing members!! In the meantime, please reach out to SupportXR@alomoves.com and we’ll get you taken care of. 😉  Again, sorry for the inconvenience, and we look forward to your experience with us only getting better!!

reviews.review_title: Won't load workout on low speed internet
reviews.review_description: I was able to load AloMoves into my Quest 2. I was also able to load a couple of very short Meditation programs. But when I tried to load a longer (eg 12 minute) Yoga program it starts loading but says it's taking longer because of slow internet speed. After about 30 seconds it stops and says ERROR; check your internet connection and try again. But I get the same result when I try again. All my other programs on Quest 2 load ok, and some take several minutes. Why does AloMoves stop so soon? It should be easy to let it take more time. My download speed per Fast is 7 Mbps on my Mac desktop and 3 Mbps on my Quest 2. PLEASE FIX THIS!!

developer_response.body:
Hey Morink27, Thank you for pointing out the streaming issue with some of the classes. We have corrected an upload error, and those classes should play properly now.   As we continue working to optimize classes, we do recommend an Internet Speed of at least 60 Mbps for a seamless experience.  Please give it another shot and let us know if you experience any further issues. 🙃

Again, thank you for your feedback. 🙏🏽 In the meantime, please reach out to SupportXR@alomoves.com and we’ll get you taken care of. 😉

reviews.review_description:
Firstly i like how when you choose free trial to TRIAL the app it auto signs you up for the £54 a year subscription after the trail... what a joke.


So upon first load i was very impressed with the 3D scanned person, actually crazy being able to move around as if there actually there.

I click the first mixed reality yoga session and seemed fine.. until i accidently pinched my hands when apparently aiming at the bar to move the woman and background, to which it then started spinning round me to the point it completely vanished.

I moved all around my room and it never reappeared ao i had to close the app.

I open it again and the next 3 times i try to start a session OR the same session all i get is the audio and no visuals at all. I move all around my room again and nothing appears, the menu doesnt even appear when pinching on the left hand.

I close and open AGAIN and try and pick 2 completely different sessions to which i get an error message, it flashes the background enviroment for a split second and then all vanishes, no menu now opens, nothing. The only option i have is to close the app AGAIN.

Absolute trash app, clearly not tested properly.

And as mentioned at the start the FREE TRIAL gets you to auto sign up for the £54 yearly sub, not the month so if you forget you can cancel after just 9.99 gets taken, no this goes for the full £54 year sub.

Seems more of scam app then an actual optimised TESTED yoga app.

DO NOT BUY OR TOUCH THIS APP.

Your welcome.

developer_response.body:
Hello Beatz!

Thank you for taking the time to review the experience. We’re sorry to hear you’ve encountered some difficulties.

We appreciate you pointing out the streaming issue with some of the classes. We have corrected an upload error, and those classes should play properly now. Please give it another try and let us know if you experience any further issues.

Regarding moving the instructor in the experience, to reposition them, pause the experience and use the distance grab feature by pinching your thumb and index finger together over the white grab indicator. Releasing your thumb and index finger will let go of the hold; otherwise, the instructor will continue to move. 

Additionally, a proximity fade occurs if you get too close to the instructor, which may cause them to appear faded out. If that happens again, you can long-press the Meta menu button to reset the instructor to their default position in front of you.

For the free trial, you can select the $9.99 monthly option, but please remember that if you cancel your subscription before the week-long trial ends, you won’t be charged.

Thank you once again for trying out the experience and sharing your feedback, as we are actively updating it in real time. If you have any additional issues or questions, please don’t hesitate to reach out via email at SupportXR@alomoves.com.

reviews.review_description: Every time I try it, I get the three dots in a black space, then I'm iny passthrough and nothing happens.

developer_response.body: Hi CireenaK, Thank you for also pointing out the streaming issue with some of the classes. We have corrected an upload error and anchoring issue, and those classes should play properly now. Please give it another shot! :) Let us know if you experience any further issues.  In the meantime, please reach out to SupportXR@alomoves.com and we’ll get you taken care of. 😉  Again, sorry for the inconvenience, and we look forward to your experience with us only getting better!!

reviews.review_description: Being able to take a virtual Pilates class and feel like my instructors is right there in my home with me is an unreal experience. Can’t wait to try out the yoga and meditation classes as well.
App was very easy to use and intuitive. The little mini instructors were very helpful and a nice touch. Amazing start and excited for more Pilates content.

reviews.review_title: Not for me, stopped a few times
reviews.review_description: Very impressive app.  Stopped a few times even though my internet is fine.  Not for me as the game play fitness is what makes it fun.

developer_response.body:
Hi Funloving, Thank you for reaching out and sharing your thoughts with us! 🙏🏽 We appreciate you pointing out the streaming issue with some of the classes. We have corrected an upload error, and those classes should play properly now. Please give it another shot! 🙃 Let us know if you experience any further issues.  

In the meantime, please reach out to SupportXR@alomoves.com and we’ll get you taken care of. 😉  Again, sorry for the inconvenience, and we look forward to your experience with us only getting better!!

reviews.review_description: Meditating on this app has been such a game changer. It’s helped me release so much stress and anxiousness in my mind…. it actually helps put me into a meditative state. 10/10 for beginners.
super cool app! i’m looking forward to new classes and content
I never thought I’d find myself doing VR, but after taking a few classes I’m hooked. Love the 3D instructors! The backgrounds are pretty gorgeous too!
I like dropping in for a quick class

reviews.review_title: Felt so real!! Pilates was super fun!
reviews.review_description: Such a cool experience!! I definitely wish it had more classes, but they posted they’ll be coming regularly so excited for those! The sound baths were also really fun too! Excited for the future of this app!
Absolutely incredible! Best 3D instructors ever.

This tech is still a bit young, but I love where it’s headed!! Hoping they continue to release more classes regularly. The 3D instructors are really cool and life-like. I also really enjoyed moving around the miniature instructors so I could see what they were doing without looking up. They definitely thought this through and I’m excited to see more content soon!

Alo Moves XR is AMAZINGGGG! I'm a Pilates and yoga newbie and I'm not going to lie,  I was a bit nervous to try this. However, the instructors are so good at making it easy to follow and it actually feels like they’re right there with you giving you private training. I love the virtual locations but the mini instructors are the best part. It took a few sessions to get used to working out with a headset but it’s second nature now. Def worth checking out if you’re trying to work out at home.

reviews.review_title: Super Cool! Very Impressed w/ 3D Models
reviews.review_description:
I’m a believer! Looking forward to the app adding more classes, but overall a very cool experience. Felt like a private yoga class in my living room. Definitely fun and worth a shot!

Only feature request would be the ability to download classes for when not on Wi-Fi! 🙏🏽
Super cool experience, first time doing 3D yoga and I’m into it.

I’ve done a few classes, mostly Pilates, and I’m really enjoying it so far! The workouts feel perfect for VR, and I’m getting a great workout right at home. It’s so convenient :). Definitely worth checking out if you want a solid workout from your living room!
